title: Level 10: Flexbox Alignment
description: Web Design ka sabse bada sawal: 'Isko Center kaise karun?'
guide:
Alignment Guide

  • justify-content: Ye items ko Left-Right (Main Axis) move karta hai.
  • align-items: Ye items ko Top-Bottom (Cross Axis) move karta hai.

Dono ko center kar do, aur item perfectly beech me aa jayega!
